title: cystium yuccanum
intro: Cystium yuccanum, also known as desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers, which bloom from February to April. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cystium yuccanum has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical application.
